name: rotli
description: Rotli local-first notes app — menu-bar, chats, docs
postInit: Open Rotli → Settings → set the memex path to this directory
memex status — confirm the handshake (id · contract · mode · apps)
Joining an EXISTING memex instead (one Breve already uses)? Don't init — run `memex connect rotli chat-system` inside it (or `memex connect rotli chat-system --root <dir>`).
